meta.homeDescription: {brandName} partner-branded commerce shell with storefront-aware checkout, legal, and support context.
meta.checkoutDescription: Canonical quote, checkout session, order, and payment flow for {brandName}.
meta.supportDescription: Storefront-bound support routing and communication profile for {brandName}.
meta.legalDescription: Resolved legal-document set and customer obligations for {brandName}.

home.title: {brandName}
home.subtitle: Customer-facing surface bound to auth realm {realmKey}, storefront routing, branded support, and legal context.

checkout.title: Canonical checkout shell
checkout.subtitle: This storefront reads pricebooks, legal bindings, entitlements, and service state from backend-owned contracts for {brandName}.
checkout.empty: No eligible offers are currently active for this storefront.
checkout.legalNotice: Checkout remains bound to {count} legal documents for this storefront.

support.title: {brandName} support routing
support.subtitle: Customer support stays storefront-aware. Partner operator escalation remains on portal hosts.

auth.title: {brandName} customer sign in
auth.subtitle: Use customer credentials for this storefront. Partner workspace identity remains isolated on portal hosts.
auth.registerBlockedTitle: Customer self-serve registration stays on the official identity surface
auth.registerBlockedDescription: Use an existing customer account for branded checkout, or contact storefront support before creating a new identity.
auth.verifyBlockedTitle: Email verification for new customer identities stays outside the partner portal shell
auth.verifyBlockedDescription: Return to the storefront and continue with an existing account, or contact support to finish onboarding.
